creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to William Grzybowski from comment #3)
> Tobik, sorry I neglected this for so long but I have not been using BSD as
> my desktop anymore and not been having free time to work on this.
> 
> I see you have committed other PRs, do you want to take care of this too?

Will do. Thanks for unblocking.
